content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Bruker Corporation: Working Student (m/f/d) DevOps – Software Development Baden-Württemberg DevOps and Sysadmin Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Ettlingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://bruker.com">http://bruker.com</a> </p> <div class="iCIMS_JobContent"> <h2 class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoField_Job"> Overview </h2> <div class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoMsg_Job"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Container"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Text"> <p><span>Bruker is enabling scientists to make breakthrough discoveries and develop new applications that improve the quality of human life. Bruker’s high performance scientific instruments and high value analytical and diagnostic solutions enable scientists to explore life and materials at molecular, cellular, and microscopic levels. In close cooperation with our customers, Bruker is enabling innovation, improved productivity, and customer success in life science molecular and cell biology research, in applied and pharma applications, in microscopy and nanoanalysis, as well as in industrial applications. Today, worldwide more than 9 700 employees (more than 2000 employees in R&amp;D) are working on this permanent challenge, at over 100 locations on all continents.</span></p><p>&nbsp;</p><p><span>Bruker offers differentiated, high-value life science and diagnostics systems and solutions in preclinical imaging, clinical phenomics research, proteomics and multiomics, spatial and single-cell biology, functional structural and condensate biology, as well as in clinical microbiology and molecular diagnostics.</span></p><p><span>&nbsp;</span></p><p><span>We are seeking a <strong>Working Student (m/f/d) DevOps – Software Development</strong> to join our Digital Services Development team within our R&amp;D department, ideally for 20 hours per week.</span></p> </div> </div> </div> <h2 class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoField_Job"> Responsibilities </h2> <div class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoMsg_Job"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Container"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Text"> <ul><li><span>Development of small tools and scripts to increase efficiency in software development </span></li><li><span>Support in the further development of the DevOps and security toolchain within the software department </span></li><li><span>Monitoring, maintenance, and documentation of existing DevOps and security tools </span></li><li><span>Assistance in the further development and stabilization of the test automation environment </span></li><li><span>Gaining insight into modern DevOps processes and collaborating with experienced development teams </span></li></ul> </div> </div> </div> <h2 class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoField_Job"> Qualifications </h2> <div class="iCIMS_InfoMsg iCIMS_InfoMsg_Job"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Container"> <div class="iCIMS_Expandable_Text"> <ul><li><span>You are an enrolled student in computer science or a comparable field of study </span></li><li><span>Initial practical programming experience is an advantage </span></li><li><span>You stand out for your independent, structured working style and strong willingness to learn </span></li><li><span>You have an interest in modern software development at the intersection of hardware, software, and cloud technologies </span></li><li><span>Good English skills are required for collaboration in an international team; German skills are a plus</span></li></ul><p>&nbsp;</p><p><span><span>We Offer</span></span></p><ul><li><span>Hands-on insights into the operations of a high-tech company </span></li><li><span>The opportunity to work as part of a professional team </span></li><li><span>An attractive hourly wage (€16–18, depending on prior experience)</span></li></ul><p>&nbsp;</p><p><span>In our team, you can gain relevant practical experience alongside your studies and discover how you can apply your existing skills in a real-world environment.</span></p> </div> </div> </div> </div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a
